All four check commands pass.

Summary:
- Added `TestParsePlanMinimalValidPlan` to `bob_tools/planfile/tests/test_parser.py:858`, covering five end-to-end cases on hand-crafted whole-plan inputs.
- Two cases from the task description ("missing H1 raises" and "implicit phase zero") describe behavior the compat parser doesn't implement (per earlier 2.5.2 decisions documented in NOTES.md). The new tests pin the actual compat-mode behavior so Stage 3 strict mode tightens these deliberately rather than accidentally.
- Added a NOTES.md `[2.5.5]` Observations entry explaining the deviation.
- All four checks pass: ruff check, ruff format --check, pytest (326 passed), mypy.
